title: Arundarbor oldhamii

This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and enhancing immune function. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are decoctions and infusions, often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
